column11: Pressure sensor characterization
Items:
· Data Package: dataset containing:
· Timestamp in [s] calculated through microcontroller internal clock
· Water pressure measured with BAR-02 pressure sensor
· Depth calculated through pressure data (current pressure - pressure offset) * 0.101972
· Temperature in [ºC] measured through pressure sensor (it also measures temperature)
· Magnetic encoder directly measuring the motor shaft angle [ º ]
· Steps sent to the driver, where 0 maps to fully contracted and 68800 to fully expanded (40mm course)
· Piston position [mm] calculated through steps where 68800 steps maps to 0 mm and 0 steps maps to 40mm
Procedure:
Starting position:
· Start with piston fully extended
· Return 40mm from the maximum
· Piston reference: 0mm @ fully extended and 40mm @ fully contracted
Characterization:
· Collect data for 3 minutes in air
· Collect data for 3 minutes on the surface
· Return 2mm over 20 seconds while collecting data [repeat 20 times to make full course]
· Collect data for 3 minutes on the bottom
· Expand 2mm over 20 seconds while collecting data [repeat 20 times to make full course]
